v1.PodSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\tNodeSelector: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tlabels: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\"baz\": \"blah\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\trunPreFilter: false,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Matches node affinity correctly even if PreFilter is not called\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\tSpec: v1.PodSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\tAffinity: &v1.Affinity{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNodeAffinity: &v1.NodeAffinity{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRequiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: &v1.NodeSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNodeSelectorTerms: []v1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.NodeSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"GPU\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpExists,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"GPU\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpNotIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"AMD\", \"INTER\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tlabels: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"GPU\": \"NVIDIA-GRID-K1\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\trunPreFilter: false,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, test := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tnode := v1.Node{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\t\tName:   test.nodeName,\n\t\t\t\tLabels: test.labels,\n\t\t\t}}\n\t\t\tnodeInfo := framework.NewNodeInfo()\n\t\t\tnodeInfo.SetNode(&node)\n\n\t\t\tp, err := New(ctx, &test.args, nil)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Creating plugin: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tstate := framework.NewCycleState()\n\t\t\tvar gotStatus *framework.Status\n\t\t\tif test.runPreFilter {\n\t\t\t\tgotPreFilterResult, gotStatus := p.(framework.PreFilterPlugin).PreFilter(context.Background(), state, test.pod)\n\t\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(test.wantPreFilterStatus, gotStatus); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected PreFilter Status (-want,+got):\\n%s\", diff)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(test.wantPreFilterResult, gotPreFilterResult); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected PreFilterResult (-want,+got):\\n%s\", diff)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tgotStatus = p.(framework.FilterPlugin).Filter(context.Background(), state, test.pod, nodeInfo)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(test.wantStatus, gotStatus); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected Filter Status (-want,+got):\\n%s\", diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestNodeAffinityPriority(t *testing.T) {\n\tlabel1 := map[string]string{\"foo\": \"bar\"}\n\tlabel2 := map[string]string{\"key\": \"value\"}\n\tlabel3 := map[string]string{\"az\": \"az1\"}\n\tlabel4 := map[string]string{\"abc\": \"az11\", \"def\": \"az22\"}\n\tlabel5 := map[string]string{\"foo\": \"bar\", \"key\": \"value\", \"az\": \"az1\"}\n\n\taffinity1 := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tNodeAffinity: &v1.NodeAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.PreferredSchedulingTerm{{\n\t\t\t\tWeight: 2,\n\t\t\t\tPreference: v1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.NodeSelectorRequirement{{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"bar\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\taffinity2 := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tNodeAffinity: &v1.NodeAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.PreferredSchedulingTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 2,\n\t\t\t\t\tPreference: v1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.NodeSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"bar\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 4,\n\t\t\t\t\tPreference: v1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.NodeSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"key\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"value\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 5,\n\t\t\t\t\tPreference: v1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.NodeSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"bar\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"key\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"value\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"az\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"az1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname               string\n\t\tpod                *v1.Pod\n\t\tnodes              []*v1.Node\n\t\texpectedList       framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\targs               config.NodeAffinityArgs\n\t\trunPreScore        bool\n\t\twantPreScoreStatus *framework.Status\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"all nodes are same priority as NodeAffinity is nil\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\t\t\tAnnotations: map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: label1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: label2}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: label3}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\t// PreScore returns Skip.\n\t\t\tname: \"Skip is returned in PreScore when NodeAffinity is nil\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\t\t\tAnnotations: map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: label1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\trunPreScore:        true,\n\t\t\twantPreScoreStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"PreScore returns error when an incoming Pod has a broken affinity\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\t\t\tAnnotations: map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tSpec: v1.PodSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\tAffinity: &v1.Affinity{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNodeAffinity: &v1.NodeAffinity{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.PreferredSchedulingTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 2,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPreference: v1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.NodeSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"invalid key\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"bar\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: label1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\trunPreScore:        true,\n\t\t\twantPreScoreStatus: framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(`[0].matchExpressions[0].key: Invalid value: \"invalid key\": name part must consist of alphanumeric characters, '-', '_' or '.', and must start and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'MyName',  or 'my.name',  or '123-abc', regex used for validation is '([A-Za-z0-9][-A-Za-z0-9_.]*)?[A-Za-z0-9]')`)),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no node matches preferred scheduling requirements in NodeAffinity of pod so all nodes' priority is zero\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\tSpec: v1.PodSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\tAffinity: affinity1,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: label4}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: label2}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: label3}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t\trunPreScore:  true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"only node1 matches the preferred scheduling requirements of pod\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\tSpec: v1.PodSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\tAffinity: affinity1,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: label1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: label2}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: label3}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t\trunPreScore:  true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"all nodes matches the preferred scheduling requirements of pod but with different priorities \",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\tSpec: v1.PodSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\tAffinity: affinity2,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: label1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node5\", Labels: label5}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: label2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 18}, {Name: \"node5\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 36}},\n\t\t\trunPreScore:  true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"added affinity\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: label1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: label2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t\targs: config.NodeAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\tAddedAffinity: affinity1.NodeAffinity,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\trunPreScore: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"added affinity and pod has default affinity\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\tSpec: v1.PodSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\tAffinity: affinity1,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: label1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: label2}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: label5}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 40}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 60}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t\targs: config.NodeAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\tAddedAffinity: &v1.NodeAffinity{\n\t\t\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.PreferredSchedulingTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 3,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPreference: v1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.NodeSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"key\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"value\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\trunPreScore: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"calculate the priorities correctly even if PreScore is not called\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\tSpec: v1.PodSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\tAffinity: affinity2,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: label1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node5\", Labels: label5}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: label2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 18}, {Name: \"node5\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 36}},\n\t\t\trunPreScore:  true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, test := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\n\t\t\tstate := framework.NewCycleState()\n\t\t\tfh, _ := runtime.NewFramework(ctx, nil, nil, runtime.WithSnapshotSharedLister(cache.NewSnapshot(nil, test.nodes)))\n\t\t\tp, err := New(ctx, &test.args, fh)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Creating plugin: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tvar status *framework.Status\n\t\t\tif test.runPreScore {\n\t\t\t\tstatus = p.(framework.PreScorePlugin).PreScore(ctx, state, test.pod, tf.BuildNodeInfos(test.nodes))\n\t\t\t\tif status.Code() != test.wantPreScoreStatus.Code() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected status code from PreScore: want: %v got: %v\", test.wantPreScoreStatus.Code().String(), status.Code().String())\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif status.Message() != test.wantPreScoreStatus.Message() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected status message from PreScore: want: %v got: %v\", test.wantPreScoreStatus.Message(), status.Message())\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\t\t// no need to proceed.\n\t\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tvar gotList framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\t\tfor _, n := range test.nodes {\n\t\t\t\tnodeName := n.ObjectMeta.Name\n\t\t\t\tscore, status := p.(framework.ScorePlugin).Score(ctx, state, test.pod, nodeName)\n\t\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tgotList = append(gotList, framework.NodeScore{Name: nodeName, Score: score})\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tstatus = p.(framework.ScorePlugin).ScoreExtensions().NormalizeScore(ctx, state, test.pod, gotList)\n\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(test.expectedList, gotList); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"obtained scores (-want,+got):\\n%s\", diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc Test_isSchedulableAfterNodeChange(t *testing.T) {\n\tpodWithNodeAffinity := st.MakePod().NodeAffinityIn(\"foo\", []string{\"bar\"})\n\ttestcases := map[string]struct {\n\t\targs           *config.NodeAffinityArgs\n\t\tpod            *v1.Pod\n\t\toldObj, newObj interface{}\n\t\texpectedHint   framework.QueueingHint\n\t\texpectedErr    bool\n\t}{\n\t\t\"backoff-wrong-new-object\": {\n\t\t\targs:         &config.NodeAffinityArgs{},\n\t\t\tpod:          podWithNodeAffinity.Obj(),\n\t\t\tnewObj:       \"not-a-node\",\n\t\t\texpectedHint: framework.Queue,\n\t\t\texpectedErr:  true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"backoff-wrong-old-object\": {\n\t\t\targs:         &config.NodeAffinityArgs{},\n\t\t\tpod:          podWithNodeAffinity.Obj(),\n\t\t\toldObj:       \"not-a-node\",\n\t\t\tnewObj:       st.MakeNode().Obj(),\n\t\t\texpectedHint: framework.Queue,\n\t\t\texpectedErr:  true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"skip-queue-on-add\": {\n\t\t\targs:         &config.NodeAffinityArgs{},\n\t\t\tpod:          podWithNodeAffinity.Obj(),\n\t\t\tnewObj:       st.MakeNode().Obj(),\n\t\t\texpectedHint: framework.QueueSkip,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"queue-on-add\": {\n\t\t\targs:         &config.NodeAffinityArgs{},\n\t\t\tpod:          podWithNodeAffinity.Obj(),\n\t\t\tnewObj:       st.MakeNode().Label(\"foo\", \"bar\").Obj(),\n\t\t\texpectedHint: framework.Queue,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"skip-unrelated-changes\": {\n\t\t\targs:         &config.NodeAffinityArgs{},\n\t\t\tpod:          podWithNodeAffinity.Obj(),\n\t\t\toldObj:       st.MakeNode().Obj(),\n\t\t\tnewObj:       st.MakeNode().Capacity(nil).Obj(),\n\t\t\texpectedHint: framework.QueueSkip,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"skip-unrelated-changes-on-labels\": {\n\t\t\targs:         &config.NodeAffinityArgs{},\n\t\t\tpod:          podWithNodeAffinity.DeepCopy(),\n\t\t\toldObj:       st.MakeNode().Obj(),\n\t\t\tnewObj:       st.MakeNode().Label(\"k\", \"v\").Obj(),\n\t\t\texpectedHint: framework.QueueSkip,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"skip-labels-changes-on-node-from-suitable-to-unsuitable\": {\n\t\t\targs:         &config.NodeAffinityArgs{},\n\t\t\tpod:          podWithNodeAffinity.DeepCopy(),\n\t\t\toldObj:       st.MakeNode().Label(\"foo\", \"bar\").Obj(),\n\t\t\tnewObj:       st.MakeNode().Label(\"k\", \"v\").Obj(),\n\t\t\texpectedHint: framework.QueueSkip,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"queue-on-labels-change-makes-pod-schedulable\": {\n\t\t\targs:         &config.NodeAffinityArgs{},\n\t\t\tpod:          podWithNodeAffinity.Obj(),\n\t\t\toldObj:       st.MakeNode().Obj(),\n\t\t\tnewObj:       st.MakeNode().Label(\"foo\", \"bar\").Obj(),\n\t\t\texpectedHint: framework.Queue,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"skip-queue-on-add-scheduler-enforced-node-affinity\": {\n\t\t\targs: &config.NodeAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\tAddedAffinity: &v1.NodeAffinity{\n\t\t\t\t\tRequiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: &v1.NodeSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNodeSelectorTerms: []v1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.NodeSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"bar\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tpod:          podWithNodeAffinity.Obj(),\n\t\t\tnewObj:       st.MakeNode().Obj(),\n\t\t\texpectedHint: framework.QueueSkip,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"queue-on-add-scheduler-enforced-node-affinity\": {\n\t\t\targs: &config.NodeAffinityArgs{\n\t\t\t\tAddedAffinity: &v1.NodeAffinity{\n\t\t\t\t\tRequiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: &v1.NodeSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNodeSelectorTerms: []v1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.NodeSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.NodeSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"bar\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tpod:          podWithNodeAffinity.Obj(),\n\t\t\tnewObj:       st.MakeNode().Label(\"foo\", \"bar\").Obj(),\n\t\t\texpectedHint: framework.Queue,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testcases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tlogger, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tp, err := New(ctx, tc.args, nil)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Creating plugin: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tactualHint, err := p.(*NodeAffinity).isSchedulableAfterNodeChange(logger, tc.pod, tc.oldObj, tc.newObj)\n\t\t\tif tc.expectedErr {\n\t\t\t\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\trequire.Equal(t, tc.expectedHint, actualHint)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",

\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\"\n\t\"k8s.io/klog/v2/ktesting\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/apis/config\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\"\n\tplugintesting map[string]string{\"team\": \"team1\"}\nvar nsLabelT2 = map[string]string{\"team\": \"team2\"}\nvar namespaces = []runtime.Object{\n\t&v1.Namespace{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: nsLabelT1}},\n\t&v1.Namespace{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"subteam2.team1\", Labels: nsLabelT1}},\n\t&v1.Namespace{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"subteam1.team2\", Labels: nsLabelT2}},\n\t&v1.Namespace{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"subteam2.team2\", Labels: nsLabelT2}},\n}\n\nfunc TestPreferredAffinity(t *testing.T) {\n\tlabelRgChina := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"region\": \"China\",\n\t}\n\tlabelRgIndia := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"region\": \"India\",\n\t}\n\tlabelAzAz1 := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"az\": \"az1\",\n\t}\n\tlabelAzAz2 := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"az\": \"az2\",\n\t}\n\tlabelRgChinaAzAz1 := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"region\": \"China\",\n\t\t\"az\":     \"az1\",\n\t}\n\tpodLabelSecurityS1 := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"security\": \"S1\",\n\t}\n\tpodLabelSecurityS2 := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"security\": \"S2\",\n\t}\n\t// considered only preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution in pod affinity\n\tstayWithS1InRegion := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAffinity: &v1.PodAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 5,\n\t\t\t\t\tPodAffinityTerm: v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"security\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues: &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAffinity: &v1.PodAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 6,\n\t\t\t\t\tPodAffinityTerm: \"region\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\taffinity3 := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAffinity: &v1.PodAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 8,\n\t\t\t\t\tPodAffinityTerm: v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"security\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpNotIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues: &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAffinity: &v1.PodAffinity{\n\t\t\tRequiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAntiAffinity: &v1.PodAntiAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"security\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues: az.\n\tawayFromS2InAz := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAntiAffinity: &v1.PodAntiAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 5,\n\t\t\t\t\tPodAffinityTerm: v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"security\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues: region, stay away from security S2 in any az.\n\tstayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAffinity: &v1.PodAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 8,\n\t\t\t\t\tPodAffinityTerm: v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 5,\n\t\t\t\t\tPodAffinityTerm: v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"security\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues: &v1.PodAntiAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 5,\n\t\t\t\t\tPodAffinityTerm: \"region\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaces:  []string{\"subteam2.team2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"team\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"team1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tinvalidAffinityLabels := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAffinity: &v1.PodAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 8,\n\t\t\t\t\tPodAffinityTerm: v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"security\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"{{.bad-value.}}\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTopologyKey: \"region\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tinvalidAntiAffinityLabels := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAntiAffinity: &v1.PodAntiAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 5,\n\t\t\t\t\tPodAffinityTerm: v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"security\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"{{.bad-value.}}\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTopologyKey: \"az\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tpod                                *v1.Pod\n\t\tpods                               []*v1.Pod\n\t\tnodes                              []*v1.Node\n\t\texpectedList                       framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\tname                               string\n\t\tignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods bool\n\t\twantStatus                         *framework.Status\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"all nodes are same priority as Affinity is nil\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t},\n\t\t// the node(node1) that have the label {\"region\": \"China\"} (match the topology key) and that have existing pods that match the labelSelector get high score\n\t\t// the node(node3) that don't have the label {\"region\": \"whatever the value is\"} (mismatch the topology key) but that have existing pods that match the labelSelector get low score\n\t\t// the node(node2) that have the label {\"region\": \"China\"} (match the topology key) but that have existing pods that mismatch the labelSelector get low score\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity: pod that matches topology key & pods in nodes will get high score comparing to others\" +\n\t\t\t\t\"which doesn't match either pods in nodes or in topology key\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// the node1(node1) that have the label {\"region\": \"China\"} (match the topology key) and that have existing pods that match the labelSelector get high score\n\t\t// the node2(node2) that have the label {\"region\": \"China\"}, match the topology key and have the same label value with node1, get the same high score with node1\n\t\t// the node3(node3) that have the label {\"region\": \"India\"}, match the topology key but have a different label value, don't have existing pods that match the labelSelector,\n\t\t// get a low score.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"All the nodes that have the same topology key & label value with one of them has an existing pod that match the affinity rules, have the same score\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegion}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChinaAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// there are 2 regions, say regionChina(node1,node3,node4) and regionIndia(node2,node5), both regions have nodes that match the preference.\n\t\t// But there are more nodes(actually more existing pods) in regionChina that match the preference than regionIndia.\n\t\t// Then, nodes in regionChina get higher score than nodes in regionIndia, and all the nodes in regionChina should get a same score(high score),\n\t\t// while all the nodes in regionIndia should get another same score(low score).\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity: nodes in one region has more matching pods comparing to other region, so the region which has more matches will get high score\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node4\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node5\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node4\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node5\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node4\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node5\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Test with the different operators and values for pod affinity scheduling preference, including some match failures.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity: different Label operators and values for pod affinity scheduling preference, including some match failures \",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: affinity3}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 20}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Test the symmetry cases for affinity, the difference between affinity and symmetry is not the pod wants to run together with some existing pods,\n\t\t// but the existing pods have the inter pod affinity preference while the pod to schedule satisfy the preference.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity symmetry: considered only the preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution in pod affinity symmetry\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity symmetry with namespace selector\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: affinityNamespaceSelector}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"AntiAffinity symmetry with namespace selector\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: antiAffinityNamespaceSelector}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity symmetry: considered RequiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution in pod affinity symmetry\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardAffinity}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardAffinity}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t// The pod to schedule prefer to stay away from some existing pods at node level using the pod anti affinity.\n\t\t// the nodes that have the label {\"node\": \"bar\"} (match the topology key) and that have existing pods that match the labelSelector get low score\n\t\t// the nodes that don't have the label {\"node\": \"whatever the value is\"} (mismatch the topology key) but that have existing pods that match the labelSelector get high score\n\t\t// the nodes that have the label {\"node\": \"bar\"} (match the topology key) but that have existing pods that mismatch the labelSelector get high score\n\t\t// there are 2 nodes, say node1 and node2, both nodes have pods that match the labelSelector and have topology-key in node.Labels.\n\t\t// But there are more pods on node1 that match the preference than node2. Then, node1 get a lower score than node2.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Anti Affinity: pod that does not match existing pods in node will get high score \",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: awayFromS1InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Anti Affinity: pod that does not match topology key & match the pods in nodes will get higher score comparing to others \",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: awayFromS1InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Anti Affinity: one node has more matching pods comparing to other node, so the node which has more unmatches will get high score\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: awayFromS1InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Test the symmetry cases for anti affinity\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Anti Affinity symmetry: the existing pods in node which has anti affinity match will get high score\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: awayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: awayFromS1InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelAzAz2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Test both  affinity and anti-affinity\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity and Anti Affinity: considered only preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution in both pod affinity & anti affinity\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Combined cases considering both affinity and anti-affinity, the pod to schedule and existing pods have the same labels (they are in the same RC/service),\n\t\t// the pod prefer to run together with its brother pods in the same region, but wants to stay away from them at node level,\n\t\t// so that all the pods of a RC/service can stay in a same region but trying to separate with each other\n\t\t// node-1,node-3,node-4 are in ChinaRegion others node-2,node-5 are in IndiaRegion\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity and Anti Affinity: considering both affinity and anti-affinity, the pod to schedule and existing pods have the same labels\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node4\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node5\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChinaAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node4\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node5\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node4\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node5\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Consider Affinity, Anti Affinity and symmetry together.\n\t\t// for Affinity, the weights are:                8,  0,  0,  0\n\t\t// for Anti Affinity, the weights are:           0, -5,  0,  0\n\t\t// for Affinity symmetry, the weights are:       0,  0,  8,  0\n\t\t// for Anti Affinity symmetry, the weights are:  0,  0,  0, -5\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity and Anti Affinity and symmetry: considered only preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution in both pod affinity & anti affinity & symmetry\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node4\", Affinity: awayFromS1InAz}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node4\", Labels: labelAzAz2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node4\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Cover https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/82796 which panics upon:\n\t\t// 1. Some nodes in a topology don't have pods with affinity, but other nodes in the same topology have.\n\t\t// 2. The incoming pod doesn't have affinity.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Avoid panic when partial nodes in a topology don't have pods with affinity\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"invalid Affinity fails PreScore\",\n\t\t\tpod:        &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: invalidAffinityLabels}},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.Error, `Invalid value: \"{{.bad-value.}}\"`),\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"invalid AntiAffinity fails PreScore\",\n\t\t\tpod:        &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: invalidAntiAffinityLabels}},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.Error, `Invalid value: \"{{.bad-value.}}\"`),\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity with pods matching NamespaceSelector\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{Affinity: affinityNamespaceSelector}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team2\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam2.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Ignore preferred terms of existing pods\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList:                       []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t\twantStatus:                         framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t\tignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Do not ignore preferred terms of existing pods\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList:                       []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t\tignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: false,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"No nodes to score\",\n\t\t\tpod:        &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\tpods:       []*v1.Pod{},\n\t\t\tnodes:      []*v1.Node{},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, test := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tstate := framework.NewCycleState()\n\t\t\tp := plugintesting.SetupPluginWithInformers(ctx, t, New, &config.InterPodAffinityArgs{HardPodAffinityWeight: 1, IgnorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: test.ignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods}, cache.NewSnapshot(test.pods, test.nodes), namespaces)\n\t\t\tstatus := p.(framework.PreScorePlugin).PreScore(ctx, state, test.pod, tf.BuildNodeInfos(test.nodes))\n\n\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\tif status.Code() != test.wantStatus.Code() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"InterPodAffinity#PreScore() returned unexpected status.Code got: %v, want: %v\", status.Code(), test.wantStatus.Code())\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tif !strings.Contains(status.Message(), test.wantStatus.Message()) {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"InterPodAffinity#PreScore() returned unexpected status.Message got: %v, want: %v\", status.Message(), test.wantStatus.Message())\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar gotList framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\t\tfor _, n := range test.nodes {\n\t\t\t\tnodeName := n.ObjectMeta.Name\n\t\t\t\tscore, status := p.(framework.ScorePlugin).Score(ctx, state, test.pod, nodeName)\n\t\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error from Score: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tgotList = append(gotList, framework.NodeScore{Name: nodeName, Score: score})\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tstatus = p.(framework.ScorePlugin).ScoreExtensions().NormalizeScore(ctx, state, test.pod, gotList)\n\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error from NormalizeScore: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(test.expectedList, gotList); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"node score list doesn't match (-want,+got): \\n %s\", diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestPreferredAffinityWithHardPodAffinitySymmetricWeight(t *testing.T) {\n\tpodLabelServiceS1 := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"service\": \"S1\",\n\t}\n\tlabelRgChina := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"region\": \"China\",\n\t}\n\tlabelRgIndia := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"region\": \"India\",\n\t}\n\tlabelAzAz1 := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"az\": \"az1\",\n\t}\n\thardPodAffinity := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAffinity: &v1.PodAffinity{\n\t\t\tRequiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"service\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"S1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaces: []string{\"\", \"subteam2.team2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"team\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"team1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tTopologyKey: \"region\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tpod                   *v1.Pod\n\t\tpods                  []*v1.Pod\n\t\tnodes                 []*v1.Node\n\t\thardPodAffinityWeight int32\n\t\texpectedList          framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\tname                  string\n\t\twantStatus            *framework.Status\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"with default weight\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelServiceS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\thardPodAffinityWeight: v1.DefaultHardPodAffinitySymmetricWeight,\n\t\t\texpectedList:          []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"with zero weight\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelServiceS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\thardPodAffinityWeight: 0,\n\t\t\twantStatus:            framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"with no matching namespace\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team2\", Labels: podLabelServiceS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\thardPodAffinityWeight: v1.DefaultHardPodAffinitySymmetricWeight,\n\t\t\twantStatus:            framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"with matching NamespaceSelector\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelServiceS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\thardPodAffinityWeight: v1.DefaultHardPodAffinitySymmetricWeight,\n\t\t\texpectedList:          []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"with matching Namespaces\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam2.team2\", Labels: podLabelServiceS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\thardPodAffinityWeight: v1.DefaultHardPodAffinitySymmetricWeight,\n\t\t\texpectedList:          []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, test := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tstate := framework.NewCycleState()\n\t\t\tp := plugintesting.SetupPluginWithInformers(ctx, t, New, &config.InterPodAffinityArgs{HardPodAffinityWeight: test.hardPodAffinityWeight}, cache.NewSnapshot(test.pods, test.nodes), namespaces)\n\t\t\tstatus := p.(framework.PreScorePlugin).PreScore(ctx, state, test.pod, tf.BuildNodeInfos(test.nodes))\n\t\t\tif !test.wantStatus.Equal(status) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"InterPodAffinity#PreScore() returned unexpected status.Code got: %v, want: %v\", status.Code(), test.wantStatus.Code())\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar gotList framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\t\tfor _, n := range test.nodes {\n\t\t\t\tnodeName := n.ObjectMeta.Name\n\t\t\t\tscore, status := p.(framework.ScorePlugin).Score(ctx, state, test.pod, nodeName)\n\t\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\npackage tainttoleration\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"reflect\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\tv1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/klog/v2/ktesting\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework/runtime\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/internal/cache\"\n\ttf \"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/testing/framework\"\n)\n\nfunc nodeWithTaints(nodeName string, taints []v1.Taint) *v1.Node {\n\treturn &v1.Node{\n\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\tName: nodeName,\n\t\t},\n\t\tSpec: v1.NodeSpec{\n\t\t\tTaints: taints,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc podWithTolerations(podName string, tolerations []v1.Toleration) *v1.Pod {\n\treturn &v1.Pod{\n\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\t\tName: podName,\n\t\t},\n\t\tSpec: v1.PodSpec{\n\t\t\tTolerations: tolerations,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestTaintTolerationScore(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname         string\n\t\tpod          *v1.Pod\n\t\tnodes        []*v1.Node\n\t\texpectedList framework.NodeScoreList\n\t}{\n\t\t// basic test case\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"node with taints tolerated by the pod, gets a higher score than those node with intolerable taints\",\n\t\t\tpod: podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{{\n\t\t\t\tKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.TolerationOpEqual,\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\tEffect:   v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t}}),\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t}}),\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeB\", []v1.Taint{{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"blah\",\n\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t}}),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeA\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeB\", Score: 0},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// the count of taints that are tolerated by pod, does not matter.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"the nodes that all of their taints are tolerated by the pod, get the same score, no matter how many tolerable taints a node has\",\n\t\t\tpod: podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"cpu-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.TolerationOpEqual,\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"arm64\",\n\t\t\t\t\tEffect:   v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t}, {\n\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"disk-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.TolerationOpEqual,\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"ssd\",\n\t\t\t\t\tEffect:   v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{}),\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeB\", []v1.Taint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"cpu-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"arm64\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeC\", []v1.Taint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"cpu-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"arm64\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t\t}, {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"disk-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"ssd\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeA\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeB\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeC\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// the count of taints on a node that are not tolerated by pod, matters.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"the more intolerable taints a node has, the lower score it gets.\",\n\t\t\tpod: podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{{\n\t\t\t\tKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.TolerationOpEqual,\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\tEffect:   v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t}}),\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{}),\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeB\", []v1.Taint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"cpu-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"arm64\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeC\", []v1.Taint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"cpu-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"arm64\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t\t}, {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"disk-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"ssd\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeA\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeB\", Score: 50},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeC\", Score: 0},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// taints-tolerations priority only takes care about the taints and tolerations that have effect PreferNoSchedule\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"only taints and tolerations that have effect PreferNoSchedule are checked by taints-tolerations priority function\",\n\t\t\tpod: podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"cpu-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.TolerationOpEqual,\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"arm64\",\n\t\t\t\t\tEffect:   v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t}, {\n\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"disk-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator: v1.TolerationOpEqual,\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"ssd\",\n\t\t\t\t\tEffect:   v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{}),\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeB\", []v1.Taint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"cpu-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"arm64\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeC\", []v1.Taint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"cpu-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"arm64\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t\t}, {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"disk-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"ssd\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeA\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeB\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeC\", Score: 0},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Default behaviour No taints and tolerations, lands on node with no taints\",\n\t\t\t//pod without tolerations\n\t\t\tpod: podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{}),\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t//Node without taints\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{}),\n\t\t\t\tnodeWithTaints(\"nodeB\", []v1.Taint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:    \"cpu-type\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  \"arm64\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEffect: v1.TaintEffectPreferNoSchedule,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeA\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"nodeB\", Score: 0},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, test := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\n\t\t\tstate := framework.NewCycleState()\n\t\t\tsnapshot := cache.NewSnapshot(nil, test.nodes)\n\t\t\tfh, _ := runtime.NewFramework(ctx, nil, nil, runtime.WithSnapshotSharedLister(snapshot))\n\n\t\t\tp, err := New(ctx, nil, fh)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"creating plugin: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tstatus := p.(framework.PreScorePlugin).PreScore(ctx, state, test.pod, tf.BuildNodeInfos(test.nodes))\n\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tvar gotList framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\t\tfor _, n := range test.nodes {\n\t\t\t\tnodeName := n.ObjectMeta.Name\n\t\t\t\tscore, status := p.(framework.ScorePlugin).Score(ctx, state, test.pod, nodeName)\n\t\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tgotList = append(gotList, framework.NodeScore{Name: nodeName, Score: score})\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tstatus = p.(framework.ScorePlugin).ScoreExtensions().NormalizeScore(ctx, state, test.pod, gotList)\n\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(test.expectedList, gotList) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected:\\n\\t%+v,\\ngot:\\n\\t%+v\", test.expectedList, gotList)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestTaintTolerationFilter(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tpod        *v1.Pod\n\t\tnode       *v1.Node\n\t\twantStatus *framework.Status\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"A pod having no tolerations can't be scheduled onto a node with nonempty taints\",\n\t\t\tpod:  podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{}),\n\t\t\tnode: nodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{{Key: \"dedicated\", Value: \"user1\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.UnschedulableAndUnresolvable,\n\t\t\t\t\"node(s) had untolerated taint {dedicated: user1}\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"A pod which can be scheduled on a dedicated node assigned to user1 with effect NoSchedule\",\n\t\t\tpod:  podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{{Key: \"dedicated\", Value: \"user1\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t\tnode: nodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{{Key: \"dedicated\", Value: \"user1\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"A pod which can't be scheduled on a dedicated node assigned to user2 with effect NoSchedule\",\n\t\t\tpod:  podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{{Key: \"dedicated\", Operator: \"Equal\", Value: \"user2\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t\tnode: nodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{{Key: \"dedicated\", Value: \"user1\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.UnschedulableAndUnresolvable,\n\t\t\t\t\"node(s) had untolerated taint {dedicated: user1}\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"A pod can be scheduled onto the node, with a toleration uses operator Exists that tolerates the taints on the node\",\n\t\t\tpod:  podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{{Key: \"foo\", Operator: \"Exists\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t\tnode: nodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{{Key: \"foo\", Value: \"bar\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"A pod has multiple tolerations, node has multiple taints, all the taints are tolerated, pod can be scheduled onto the node\",\n\t\t\tpod: podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{\n\t\t\t\t{Key: \"dedicated\", Operator: \"Equal\", Value: \"user2\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"},\n\t\t\t\t{Key: \"foo\", Operator: \"Exists\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"},\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tnode: nodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{\n\t\t\t\t{Key: \"dedicated\", Value: \"user2\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"},\n\t\t\t\t{Key: \"foo\", Value: \"bar\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"},\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"A pod has a toleration that keys and values match the taint on the node, but (non-empty) effect doesn't match, \" +\n\t\t\t\t\"can't be scheduled onto the node\",\n\t\t\tpod:  podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{{Key: \"foo\", Operator: \"Equal\", Value: \"bar\", Effect: \"PreferNoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t\tnode: nodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{{Key: \"foo\", Value: \"bar\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.UnschedulableAndUnresolvable,\n\t\t\t\t\"node(s) had untolerated taint {foo: bar}\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"The pod has a toleration that keys and values match the taint on the node, the effect of toleration is empty, \" +\n\t\t\t\t\"and the effect of taint is NoSchedule. Pod can be scheduled onto the node\",\n\t\t\tpod:  podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{{Key: \"foo\", Operator: \"Equal\", Value: \"bar\"}}),\n\t\t\tnode: nodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{{Key: \"foo\", Value: \"bar\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"The pod has a toleration that key and value don't match the taint on the node, \" +\n\t\t\t\t\"but the effect of taint on node is PreferNoSchedule. Pod can be scheduled onto the node\",\n\t\t\tpod:  podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{{Key: \"dedicated\", Operator: \"Equal\", Value: \"user2\", Effect: \"NoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t\tnode: nodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{{Key: \"dedicated\", Value: \"user1\", Effect: \"PreferNoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"The pod has no toleration, \" +\n\t\t\t\t\"but the effect of taint on node is PreferNoSchedule. Pod can be scheduled onto the node\",\n\t\t\tpod:  podWithTolerations(\"pod1\", []v1.Toleration{}),\n\t\t\tnode: nodeWithTaints(\"nodeA\", []v1.Taint{{Key: \"dedicated\", Value: \"user1\", Effect: \"PreferNoSchedule\"}}),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, test := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tnodeInfo := framework.NewNodeInfo()\n\t\t\tnodeInfo.SetNode(test.node)\n\t\t\tp, err := New(ctx, nil, nil)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"creating plugin: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tgotStatus := p.(framework.FilterPlugin).Filter(ctx, nil, test.pod, nodeInfo)\n\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(gotStatus, test.wantStatus) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"status does not match: %v, want: %v\", gotStatus, test.wantStatus)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

1. WRITE /logs/agent/solution.md
# Refactoring Analysis: ScoreExtensions → ScoreNormalizer

## Files Examined

### Core Definition (1 file)
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/interface.go` — Defines the `ScoreExtensions` interface and the `ScoreExtensions()` method on `ScorePlugin`

### Metrics (1 file)
- `pkg/scheduler/metrics/metrics.go` — Defines the `ScoreExtensionNormalize` metrics constant

### Framework Runtime (1 file)
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/runtime/framework.go` — Calls `ScoreExtensions()` and uses `ScoreExtensionNormalize` metric

### Plugin Implementations (8 files)
All implement `ScorePlugin` interface with `ScoreExtensions()` method:
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/imagelocality/image_locality.go` — Returns nil
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/nodeaffinity/node_affinity.go` — Returns self (implements NormalizeScore)
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/noderesources/balanced_allocation.go` — Returns nil
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/noderesources/fit.go` — Returns nil
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/podtopologyspread/scoring.go` — Returns self (implements NormalizeScore)
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/interpodaffinity/scoring.go` — Returns self (implements NormalizeScore)
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/tainttoleration/taint_toleration.go` — Returns self (implements NormalizeScore)
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/volumebinding/volume_binding.go` — Returns nil

### Test Files (4 files)
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/runtime/framework_test.go` — Test plugins implement `ScoreExtensions()`
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/nodeaffinity/node_affinity_test.go` — Tests call `ScoreExtensions()`
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/interpodaffinity/scoring_test.go` — Tests call `ScoreExtensions()`
- `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/tainttoleration/taint_toleration_test.go` — Tests call 
... (truncated)
2. EDIT /workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/interface.go
Before
// ScoreExtensions is an interface for Score extended functionality.
type ScoreExtensions interface {
	// NormalizeScore is called for all node scores produced by the same plugin's "Score"
	// method. A successful run of NormalizeScore will update the scores list and return
	// a success status.
	NormalizeScore(ctx context.Context, state *CycleState, p *v1.Pod, scores NodeScoreList) *Status
}

// ScorePlugin is an interface that must be implemented by "Score" plugins to rank
// nodes that passed the filtering phase.
type ScorePlugin interface {
	Plugin
	// Score is called on each filtered node. It must return success and an integer
	// indicating the rank of the node. All scoring plugins must return success or
	// the pod will be rejected.
	Score(ctx context.Context, state *CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (int64, *Status)

	// ScoreExtensions returns a ScoreExtensions interface if it implements one, or nil if does not.
	ScoreExtensions() ScoreExtensions
}
After
// ScoreNormalizer is an interface for Score normalization functionality.
type ScoreNormalizer interface {
	// NormalizeScore is called for all node scores produced by the same plugin's "Score"
	// method. A successful run of NormalizeScore will update the scores list and return
	// a success status.
	NormalizeScore(ctx context.Context, state *CycleState, p *v1.Pod, scores NodeScoreList) *Status
}

// ScorePlugin is an interface that must be implemented by "Score" plugins to rank
// nodes that passed the filtering phase.
type ScorePlugin interface {
	Plugin
	// Score is called on each filtered node. It must return success and an integer
	// indicating the rank of the node. All scoring plugins must return success or
	// the pod will be rejected.
	Score(ctx context.Context, state *CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (int64, *Status)

	// ScoreNormalizer returns a ScoreNormalizer interface if it implements one, or nil if does not.
	ScoreNormalizer() ScoreNormalizer
}
3. EDIT /workspace/pkg/scheduler/metrics/metrics.go
Before
	PostFilter                  = "PostFilter"
	PreScore                    = "PreScore"
	Score                       = "Score"
	ScoreExtensionNormalize     = "ScoreExtensionNormalize"
	PreBind                     = "PreBind"
After
	PostFilter                  = "PostFilter"
	PreScore                    = "PreScore"
	Score                       = "Score"
	ScoreNormalize              = "ScoreNormalize"
	PreBind                     = "PreBind"
4. EDIT /workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/runtime/framework.go
Before
	// Run NormalizeScore method for each ScorePlugin in parallel.
	f.Parallelizer().Until(ctx, len(plugins), func(index int) {
		pl := plugins[index]
		if pl.ScoreExtensions() == nil {
			return
		}
After
	// Run NormalizeScore method for each ScorePlugin in parallel.
	f.Parallelizer().Until(ctx, len(plugins), func(index int) {
		pl := plugins[index]
		if pl.ScoreNormalizer() == nil {
			return
		}
5. EDIT /workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/runtime/framework.go
Before
func (f *frameworkImpl) runScoreExtension(ctx context.Context, pl framework.ScorePlugin, state *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodeScoreList framework.NodeScoreList) *framework.Status {
	if !state.ShouldRecordPluginMetrics() {
		return pl.ScoreExtensions().NormalizeScore(ctx, state, pod, nodeScoreList)
	}
	startTime := time.Now()
	status := pl.ScoreExtensions().NormalizeScore(ctx, state, pod, nodeScoreList)
	f.metricsRecorder.ObservePluginDurationAsync(metrics.ScoreExtensionNormalize, pl.Name(), status.Code().String(), metrics.SinceInSeconds(startTime))
	return status
}
After
func (f *frameworkImpl) runScoreExtension(ctx context.Context, pl framework.ScorePlugin, state *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodeScoreList framework.NodeScoreList) *framework.Status {
	if !state.ShouldRecordPluginMetrics() {
		return pl.ScoreNormalizer().NormalizeScore(ctx, state, pod, nodeScoreList)
	}
	startTime := time.Now()
	status := pl.ScoreNormalizer().NormalizeScore(ctx, state, pod, nodeScoreList)
	f.metricsRecorder.ObservePluginDurationAsync(metrics.ScoreNormalize, pl.Name(), status.Code().String(), metrics.SinceInSeconds(startTime))
	return status
}

        Bash Commands (14)
        
1. $ find /workspace -type f -name "*.go" -path "*/scheduler/framework/*" | head -20
2. $ grep -n "ScoreExtensions\|NormalizeScore" /workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/podtopologyspread/scoring.go
3. $ grep -n "ScoreExtensions\|NormalizeScore" /workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/interpodaffinity/scoring.go
4. $ for file in /workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/{tainttoleration/taint_toleration.go,volumebinding/volume_binding.go,noderesources/fit.go}; do echo "=== $file ==="; grep -n "ScoreExtensions\|NormalizeScore" "$file"; done
5. $ grep -n "ScoreExtensions" /workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/noderesources/balanced_allocation.go
6. $ grep -n "ScoreExtensions()" /workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/nodeaffinity/node_affinity_test.go
7. $ grep -n "ScoreExtensions" /workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/tainttoleration/taint_toleration_test.go
8. $ grep -r "ScoreExtensions" --include="*.go" pkg/scheduler/framework/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
9. $ grep -r "ScoreExtensionNormalize" --include="*.go" pkg/scheduler/ 2>/dev/null
10. $ grep -r "ScoreNormalizer" --include="*.go" pkg/scheduler/framework/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
11. $ grep -r "ScoreNormalize" --include="*.go" pkg/scheduler/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v "ScoreNormaliz" | head -10
12. $ grep "ScoreNormalize" /workspace/pkg/scheduler/metrics/metrics.go
13. $ grep "metrics.ScoreNormalize" /workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/runtime/framework.go
14. $ go build ./pkg/scheduler/framework/...
